title: limonium cabulicum
intro: Limonium cabulicum, also known as the Cabul Sea Lavender or Afghan Sea Lavender, is a species of flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Limonium cabulicum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and soothe digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Limonium cabulicum can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to promote relaxation and relieve symptoms of colds and flu.
